remarks: Spacious and well-maintained 2-bedroom, 1-bath rental located at 71 Strawberry Hill Ave in the heart of Stamford. This bright unit features an open living and dining area, generously sized bedrooms, ample closet space, and abundant natural light throughout. Conveniently located near downtown Stamford, shopping, restaurants, parks, public transportation, and major highways. Building amenities include secured entry, elevator access, on-site property management/superintendent, swimming pool, clubhouse, playground, laundry facilities, well-equipped on-site health club, and assigned parking. A great opportunity for comfortable living in a prime Stamford location.
